projectDescription: An AI-powered conversational chatbot that evaluates graduate program applicants' prior competencies and generates personalized learning-path reports for Universidad Icesi.
keyFeatures: Conversational AI agent (LangGraph + OpenAI) that guides applicants through a structured competency assessment
Adaptive questioning system using SABER PRO-style questions across multiple difficulty levels
Vector knowledge base (ChromaDB) for semantic search over master's program documents
Personalized student reports with strengths, improvement areas, and a tailored learning path
Academic/admin reports with detailed competency breakdowns for program directors
Full-stack React + FastAPI architecture with PostgreSQL persistence and Docker deployment
Admin dashboard for reviewing evaluation sessions and exporting data for expert review
Demo mode with pre-built sample reports for UI/UX testing
publicApiSurface: POST /api/chat — Send a message and receive the agent's next response
GET /api/session/{session_id} — Retrieve session state and progress
POST /api/session/{session_id}/reset — Reset a session to start over
GET /api/report/{session_id} — Get the generated student report for a completed session
GET /api/report/demo/{demo_user} — Get a demo report (maria | carlos | ana)
GET /api/programs — List all available master's programs
GET /api/programs/{program_id}/competencies — List competencies for a program
GET /api/questions/competency/{competency_id} — Get questions for a competency
GET /api/admin/sessions/summary — Get all sessions summary for expert dashboard
GET /api/admin/export/{session_id} — Export full session data for expert review
